name: BIO-RAD LABORATORIES, INC.
business: Bio-Rad Laboratories, Inc. is a multinational life science and clinical diagnostics company that develops, manufactures, and markets instruments, systems, reagents, and consumables for biological research and clinical diagnostics. The company operates in two segments: Life Science (40% of net sales) and Clinical Diagnostics (60% of net sales), with approximately 40% of sales from the U.S. and 60% from international markets.

exposures.sentence: Our Clinical Diagnostics segment designs, manufactures, markets, and supports diagnostic test systems, informatics solutions, test kits, and specialized quality controls for clinical laboratories in the global diagnostics market.

These products are utilized in research and biopharmaceutical laboratory environments, as well as in biopharmaceutical manufacturing, quality control processes, food safety testing, and science education applications.

Our Clinical Diagnostics segment designs, manufactures, markets, and supports diagnostic test systems, informatics solutions, test kits, and specialized quality controls for clinical laboratories in the global diagnostics market.

tamClaims.claim: Life Science segment: worldwide sales of products in the markets we serve approximately $19 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the worldwide sales of products in the markets we serve to be approximately $19 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Clinical Diagnostics segment: worldwide sales of products in the markets we serve approximately $16 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the worldwide sales of products in the markets we serve to be approximately $16 billion.
